heading: PROTECTING AMERICA’S COMPETITIVE EDGE THROUGH ENERGY
label: XVII PROTECTING AMERICA’S COMPETITIVE EDGE THROUGH ENERGY
notes: CodificationThis subchapter was enacted as part of the America COMPETES Act, also known as the America Creating Opportunities to Meaningfully Promote Excellence in Technology, Education, and Science Act, and also as part of the Protecting America’s Competitive Edge Through Energy Act, also known as the PACE–Energy Act, and not as part of the Energy Policy Act of 2005, which enacted subchapters I to XVI of this chapter.
